question: How many production lines does the factory have?
reference_sql: SELECT count(*) AS line_count FROM production_lines;

question: What are the names of all the work shifts?
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM shifts ORDER BY start_time;

question: Which production line has accumulated the most unplanned downtime, measured in total minutes? Give the line and the total.
reference_sql: SELECT pl.name, SUM(de.duration_minutes) AS total_unplanned_minutes FROM downtime_events de JOIN production_lines pl ON pl.id = de.line_id WHERE de.is_planned = false GROUP BY pl.name ORDER BY total_unplanned_minutes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many work orders are currently in progress?
reference_sql: SELECT count(*) AS in_progress FROM work_orders WHERE status = 'in_progress';

question: Break down the total downtime minutes by reason code, from highest to lowest.
reference_sql: SELECT reason_code, SUM(duration_minutes) AS total_minutes FROM downtime_events GROUP BY reason_code ORDER BY total_minutes DESC;

question: For each product category, what is the scrap rate — total scrap quantity divided by total produced quantity?
reference_sql: SELECT p.category, round(SUM(po.scrap_quantity)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(po.produced_quantity), 0), 4) AS scrap_rate FROM production_output po JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.id = po.work_order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = wo.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY p.category;

question: Which product has the highest total number of defects? Give the product and the total.
reference_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(d.quantity) AS total_defects FROM defects d JOIN quality_inspections qi ON qi.id = d.inspection_id JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.id = qi.work_order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = wo.product_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY total_defects DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the overall first-pass yield — total passed divided by total inspected — for products in the Motors category?
reference_sql: SELECT round(SUM(qi.passed_quantity)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(qi.inspected_quantity), 0), 4) AS first_pass_yield FROM quality_inspections qi JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.id = qi.work_order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = wo.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Motors';

question: Which machine has the most breakdowns? Give the machine and the number of breakdown events.
reference_sql: SELECT m.name, count(*) AS breakdown_events FROM downtime_events de JOIN machines m ON m.id = de.machine_id WHERE de.reason_code = 'breakdown' GROUP BY m.name ORDER BY breakdown_events DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How many machines have never had a breakdown recorded?
reference_sql: SELECT count(*) AS machines_without_breakdown FROM machines m WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM downtime_events de WHERE de.machine_id = m.id AND de.reason_code = 'breakdown');

question: In June 2026, which production line had the most unplanned downtime minutes?
reference_sql: SELECT pl.name, SUM(de.duration_minutes) AS total_unplanned_minutes FROM downtime_events de JOIN production_lines pl ON pl.id = de.line_id WHERE de.is_planned = false AND de.occurred_at >= '2026-06-01' AND de.occurred_at < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY pl.name ORDER BY total_unplanned_minutes DESC LIMIT 1;

question: For each product category, which product has the highest total defect quantity? Give the category, the product name, and that total.
reference_sql: SELECT category, name, total FROM (SELECT p.category, p.name, SUM(d.quantity) AS total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.category ORDER BY SUM(d.quantity) DESC, p.name) AS rn FROM defects d JOIN quality_inspections qi ON qi.id = d.inspection_id JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.id = qi.work_order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = wo.product_id GROUP BY p.category, p.name) q WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY category;

question: Which production lines have total unplanned downtime above the per-line average? Give each line and its total unplanned downtime minutes.
reference_sql: SELECT pl.name, SUM(de.duration_minutes) AS total_unplanned FROM downtime_events de JOIN production_lines pl ON pl.id = de.line_id WHERE de.is_planned = false GROUP BY pl.name HAVING SUM(de.duration_minutes) > (SELECT AVG(line_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(duration_minutes) AS line_total FROM downtime_events WHERE is_planned = false GROUP BY line_id) x) ORDER BY total_unplanned DESC;

question: In which calendar month (formatted YYYY-MM) was the factory's overall scrap rate highest? Give the month and the scrap rate.
reference_sql: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', po.recorded_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month, round(SUM(po.scrap_quantity)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(po.produced_quantity), 0), 4) AS scrap_rate FROM production_output po GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY scrap_rate DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What was the outdoor temperature at the factory last week?
How many employees were hired in the last quarter?
Which raw-material supplier delivered the most components this year?
